questionHtml: By considering the minimum spanning tree found in part (b), determine whether the journey given by this lower bound is an achievable solution.
markschemeHtml:
(A1)

 

Note: Condone the omission of the weights from their diagram. The diagram may include A with its two edges.

 

correct reasoning based on lack of cycle (once A is reattached)          R1

e.g. edges BD and CD would be repeated

this lower bound is not achievable (in this way)          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

[3 marks]
